mapper.sql: id, file_name, file_path, file_type, file_size, bucket_name, business_type, business_id, uploaded_by, tenant_id, uploaded_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_file (file_name, file_path, file_type, file_size, bucket_name, business_type, business_id, uploaded_by, tenant_id, uploaded_at) VALUES (#{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{bucketName}, #{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{uploadedBy}, #{tenantId}, #{uploadedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_file WHERE business_type = #{businessType} AND business_id = #{businessId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_file WHERE uploaded_by = #{uploadedBy} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_file WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
